---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> **Note:** Project Atlas is a personal tool. Feature requests may be declined if they don't fit the scope. Bug fixes and improvements to existing features are more likely to be accepted.

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem, e.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you have thought about.

**Additional context**
Any other context, screenshots, or examples.
